meta.purpose: Capability stages for open-source project judgment.
meta.load_condition: Load when user asks about improving their project's adoption.

stages.name: Code Quality Focused
stages.description: Evaluates projects by code quality, test coverage, documentation completeness. Suggests more features, better docs, cleaner code.
indicators: Equates clean code with adoption potential

stages.name: Adoption Diagnostician
stages.description: Evaluates projects by value-entry clarity, time-to-first-value, and comparison honesty. Diagnoses adoption bottlenecks before code issues.
indicators: Checks comparison honesty before code quality

evolution_layers.name: From code quality to adoption diagnosis
evolution_layers.capability: Stop reviewing code first. Start evaluating the visitor's first 30 seconds.

measurement.what: Percentage of project reviews where value-entry clarity is evaluated before code quality
measurement.how: Review agent output for value-entry diagnosis vs code review language
